creator: Jos.Vissers@usquebaugh.telebyte.nl
text:
The port net/mrtg (mrtg-2.5.1) and graphics/ImageMagick
	(ImageMagick-4.0.2) both install a file in /usr/local/bin
	with the name "convert".

Fix: 

A set of tools like mrtg is not likely to be needed by common
	users and could therefore be installed in a seperate directory
	under /usr/local.
	The "convert" from mrtg is just a perl script to convert logfiles,
	the "convert" from ImageMagick is a binary to convert between
	various graphics formats.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Just build and install both ports, I presume installing the
	packages has the same effect.
